programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer suggests using Tauba Tauba to reverse Sarangee's magic that has made the children lose their memory. Will his plan work out?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer and the fairies help the children get their memories back. Meanwhile, Sarangee formulates her new plan against Baalveer.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Due to Sarangee Pari's magical colour, the kids lose their memory. Later, Baalveer finds her, but before he can harm her, she runs away.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer exposes Sarangee and tells her how he outwitted her and exchanged the colours beforehand. How will Sarangee react to her plans failing in front of Baalveer?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Due to Sarangee Pari's magical colour, the kids lose their memory. Later, Baalveer finds her, but before he can harm her, she runs away.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer and the fairies decide to go to Earth and be a part of the Holi celebrations unaware that Bhayankar and Sarangee Pari have prepared a toxic concoction for them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ganpat updates the members regarding the school's decision to deny Tanvi admission. Later, they come up with a plan to rectify the situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: According to the plan, Bhide and Madhavi adopt the guise of a prosperous couple and meet with the school administration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tanvi poses as Bhide and Madhavi's daughter in front of the school administration. Later, the administration agree to grant Tanvi admission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide reveals the truth to the school administration and informs them about their convesation getting recorded.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to hurry up home after Babita prepares a Bengali cuisine for him. Later, he gets angry when Champaklal interrupts his and Babita's conversation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya panics when she hears that Sundarlal has gone missing. Soon, she tells Nattu Kaka to get her tickets to Ahmedabad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to find Sundarlal by calling his friends. However, Sundarlal seems to have vanished without a trace.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya finds Sundarlal at the airport and takes him home. However, Sundarlal tells Daya and Anjali not to let anyone know he has arrived at the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is conflicted when Jethalal forces her to choose between himself and Sundarlal. Later, Daya enlists Tapu's help to sneak Sundarlal around.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is nervous about Jethalal finding Sundarlal hidden in their house. Later, Jethalal becomes suspicious when Daya is eager for him to leave.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal catches a peek of Sundarlal in his kitchen and assumes it is a burglar. Soon, the rest of Gokuldham Society panics and begins searching for the supposed criminal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Zorawar is on the lookout for Sundarlal and hunts all over the society. However, Sundarlal dresses up as a housemaid to evade capture.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundarlal dresses up as a woman to disguise himself. However, chaos ensues when the other residents assume Sundarlal is Popatlal's girlfriend.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Holi celebrations continue in full swing. Meanwhile, Zorawar and his men hunt for Sundarlal all over Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Veer Hanuman
programme.desc: In Kishkindha, Rajkumar Bali defeats the Asurs and scolds his sena for retreating during the battle. Later, Devi Anjana learns that an avatar of Mahadev is destined to be born through her.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Daya is rushed to the hospital after getting severely injured by a bomb blast. Soon, the rest of the team becomes worried about Daya's condition.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone informs Popatlal about the lottery ticket. He decides to celebrate by taking a trip to Goa, but soon realises something saddening.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Popatlal informs everyone about how he forgot the lottery ticket in his shirt pocket, they go the laundry owner's house for help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal, along with the society members, searches for the laundry owner. After struggling for a long time, they finally meet him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The laundry owner feels bad after Popatlal tells him everything and decides to give him the lottery ticket. However, he is unable to find it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone continues their search for the lottery ticket. The finally meet Manu, a bhelpuri vendor, who has the ticket.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone gathers in Gokuldham after they learn that the ticket might be there. However, when they find the ticket, Popatlal gives it to Manohar.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Popatlal gives back the winning amount to Manohar everyone is proud of him. Later, Bhide and Taarak discuss the events and celebrations for Diwali.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Yashoda refuses to take her son to the ritual without feeding him. Meanwhile, Yashoda's neighbours try their best to convince Yashoda to reconsider her decision.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: During the 90s theme, Sukriti and Anuradha pay tribute to Shah Rukh Khan. Later, the contestants put their best foot forward to impress the judges.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in the society is worried for the Gada family and try to find solutions to help Jethalal. Taarak comes up with a plan and sends a letter to Gulabo.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With a new plan in mind, Taarak asks Jethalal to hand over Daya's gold jewellery to Gulabo. Daya is surprised to see Jethalal and Gulabo together in a temple.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the society members enjoy their time in Singapore, Champakal suddenly becomes afraid of boarding the cruise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal finds Popatlal dancing with women on the sixth deck, and Bhide informs everyone about a popular show that will take place on the ship.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal becomes friendly with two girls and takes photos with them. Everyone receive a stern message from their sponsor.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After making the residents of Gokuldham run around, their trip sponsor reveals himself. He reveals the reason behind his gesture and gives them some sound advice.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali reminds Taarak of the diet he has to follow after reaching home. Everyone praises Abdul for writing the thought for the day on the board in Iyer's absence.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal calls Asit and expresses his gratitude for sponsoring the trip to Singapore.Goli gives his father a pleasant surprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita and Jethalal relive their Singapore trip memories with Iyer. Popatlal begins his day with radiating positivity.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal spreads his positive energy around Gokuldham Society. Jethalal decides to surprise Bagha and Nattu Kaka, but he is the one who ends up surprised.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal braces himself when he hears that Daya's brother Sunder is about to visit. On the other hand, an overexcited Daya wakes him up early the next day to get milk for Sunder.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder visits Gokuldham Society, much to the dismay of Jethalal. When Jethalal carries Sundar's luggage to his house, Sundar notices that the bag containing his belongings is missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder realises that he left his bag containing his belongings in Ahmedabad. He tells the Gada family about a brand new investment scheme that makes Jethalal sceptical.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder introduces his scheme to the men of Gokuldham Society, who refuse the offer, prompting Daya to try to convince all the ladies to invest in the enterprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies set off to arrange money to invest in Sunder's scheme. Jethalal learns that Babita has agreed to invest in the offer and decides to do the same despite his reservations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After investing in Sundarlal's scheme, everyone starts enquiring about their money to Jethalal and Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Sunder fails to respond to the society members' calls, Jethalal reluctantly agrees to pay them back. However, Sunder shocks everyone by arriving in the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder returns everyone's invested money with interest. The ladies meet again to discuss their favourite television serial, but an issue puts a halt to it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal and Daya try to convince Tapu and Jethalal to have breakfast. The residents complain about the water problems in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents try to get Bhide to solve the water problem, but he is busy buying vegetables; Abdul takes it upon himself to fix the problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents realise someone is locked inside the building. Potpatlal thinks Bhide is responsible for the water problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya finds an unconscious woman lying on the terrace of the building and the residents take her to Dr Haathi. Popatlal wants to know if the woman is single.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha rushes in to serve Jethalal tea as he gets down to work. Bagha and Natu Kaka argue in English. The ladies take care of Bharti and get to know her better.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After hearing Bharti's story, Daya decides to do something about the catcallers. Soon, the ladies of Gokuldham hatch a plan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and Bharti lead the residents of Gokuldham to confront the catcallers and make them take responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents call the police on the catcallers. Soon, they are escorted to their parents, and the residents expose what they have been doing to women.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Seeing his mother's tears, Tapu plots revenge on his father. This family conflict embroils Jethalal in chaos, leaving him worried about Tapu's behaviour.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's family suffer multiple setbacks when Champaklal goes missing at the train station. A worried Daya seeks help from the media.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bawri and Bagha approach Jethalal with their predicament. Champaklal convinces him to allow Bagha to pretend to own Gada Electronics temporarily.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal faces a dilemma when his meeting with Dhanraj Seth conflicts with his promise to Bagha. Bawri's parents plan to visit Bagha's shop in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal suspects Tappu is hiding something from him. Tappu is secretly planning a trip to Goa with his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sonu and Madhavi convince Bhide to let them go on the trip to Goa. Tapu Sena are happy that they can go on a trip together, but Gogi is still waiting for his answer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide arranges a meeting before the trip to Goa. However, he gets into an argument with Jethalal, and an annoyed Champaklal refuses to go with them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena promise to plan the trip themselves, but Bhide believes they will spend excessively. Madhavi tries to get Bhide to relax.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal assigns Bhide to take care of Champaklal in Goa. At the airport, everyone questions the intensive security check before they find out that a thief is trying to smuggle an artefact.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In Goa, the thief follows the Gokuldham society residents to their resort as he is determined to find the smuggled artefact.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tony's boss pressures him to find the smuggled artefact. The Gokuldham society residents are enjoying their vacation, unaware that Tony is following them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After failing to retrieve the artefact, Tony's boss reprimands him. While those who are in Goa enjoy sports day, Jethalal, Taarak, and the other residents call Bhide from Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan, Sodhi, and Bhide meet a foreign tourist on the beach and introduce her to Popatlal. Madhavi and Roshan confront Sodhi and Bhide after learning of a secret.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and Bhide prank their wives by telling them they are going to have iced tea. Tapu Sena plan a surprise for the adults.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The thieves try to get away from Chalu Pandey, but Roshan Sodhi catches them. The police manage to arrest the mastermind behind the operation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham society residents return home and realise that Champaklal is missing. Jethalal blames Bhide for being irresponsible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bharat Bhai seeks help from Jethalal to hide some cash in his house. Jethalal is scared about the black money but agrees to help his friend.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: One of Jethalal's friends hands him 5,000,000 rupees in cash in a steel box. Jethalal asks Daya to keep the box safe in her cupboard.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak takes a day off from work to write an article on corruption. Jethalal calls Taarak and tells him about the money he has at home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak Mehta learns that Jethalal is growing tired of running his business because of the pressure. Jethalal shouts at Nattu Kakka and Bagha about the store.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When all the men from the society are having soda, Jethalal tells them about his work problems. Champaklal learns of this and motivates him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Goli catches Taarak throwing away the bitter gourd juice given to him by Anjali. After seeing the newspaper ad, Jethalal's neighbours decide to talk to him about the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A strange kid refuses to give his mother's mobile number until Bawri agrees to his request. Taarak tries to help Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal assures Champaklal that he will not sell his shop and learns that Nattu Kaka and Baga are responsible for putting the ad in the newspaper.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal remembers that when he was in a desperate situation, he had asked Nattu Kaka and Bagha to sell the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha tell Jethalal why they decided to sell the shop. Magan reveals that the new owner wants them to vacate the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Two well-built men try to hoist banners outside Jethalal's shop and ask him to sign the licensing agreement of the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Two men inform Jethalal that Surma Bhai wishes to acquire his property. When Champaklal pleads with them to let him meet Surma Bhai, they arrange for a meeting at midnight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide informs Jethalal's neighbours that Jethalal is in trouble. Jethalal calls Mehta and asks him to accompany him for his meeting with Surma Bhai.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal shares his worries with regards to the shop with his neighbours. Popatlal informs him that he has found someone whom Surma Bhai will listen to.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Kajal Behen demands INR 50 lakhs from Jethalal in exchange for her help. Surma Bhai's thugs call and threaten Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's friends decide to meet Surma Bhai and to convince him to let go of the shop. They accompany Jethalal to meet Surma Bhai at Madh Island.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At Madh Island, Jethalal and his neighbours lose their way and spot a woman wearing a white saree and holding a diya. At Surma Bhai's bungalow, a man recounts his harrowing tale.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Surma Bhai shows Jethalal a video in which Nattu Kaka tells that Jethalal has agreed to sell the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Surma Bhai tells Jethalal that he wishes to gift the shop to Munna and threatens to kidnap Nattu Kaka if Jethalal refuses to vacate the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi advises Jethalal to consult a lawyer with regards to the shop. Jethalal and his neighbours go to meet the lawyer the following day.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Surma Bhai's thugs order Jethalal to vacate the shop within 52 hours. Dawawala advises Jethalal to file a criminal case against Nattu Kaka.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The lawyer advises Jethalal to fire Nattu Kaka in order to make his case stronger. When Jethalal refuses, Dr Hathi asks everyone to consult with anybody they can to help resolve the issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and everyone tries to think of a solution to save Gada Electronics from Surma Bhai, but they find that their resistance is futile.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is heartbroken as he has no choice but to sell off Gada Electronics. He decides to seclude himself from everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On their way to the police station, Jethalal's friends find him sitting inside the temple. Champaklal consoles Jethalal and mentions that businesses can be rebuilt.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Surma Bhai completes the deal for Gada Electronics, the newspapers deliver positive news for Jethalal alongside negative information.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Surma Bhai instructs Jethalal to hold on to the cheque as his sign is incorrect. He visits Nattu Kaka and Bagha and tells them that he does not wish to buy the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal informs Soorma Bhai that he does not wish to cancel the deal. Soorma Bhai refuses to listen to him and tells him about his meeting with Nattu Kaka and Bagha.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On learning that Nattu Kaka and Bagha cancelled the deal, Jethalal takes out his anger on them. Tapu and friends gives Jethalal the good news regarding the shop.
